all_repos.name: Lum1104/Understand-Anything
all_repos.description: Graphs that teach > graphs that impress. Turn any code into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI, and more.

all_repos.name: anthropics/knowledge-work-plugins
all_repos.description: Open source repository of plugins primarily intended for knowledge workers to use in Claude Cowork

all_repos.description: Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.

all_repos.name: affaan-m/ECC
all_repos.description: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.

all_repos.name: mukul975/Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills
all_repos.description: 754 structured cybersecurity skills for AI agents · Mapped to 5 frameworks: MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF 2.0, MITRE ATLAS, D3FEND & NIST AI RMF · agentskills.io standard · Works with Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Codex CLI, Cursor, Gemini CLI & 20+ platforms · 26 security domains · Apache 2.0

all_repos.name: colbymchenry/codegraph
all_repos.description: Pre-indexed code knowledge graph for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenCode, and Hermes Agent — fewer tokens, fewer tool calls, 100% local

all_repos.name: manaflow-ai/cmux
all_repos.description: Ghostty-based macOS terminal with vertical tabs and notifications for AI coding agents

all_repos.name: multica-ai/andrej-karpathy-skills
all_repos.description: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.

all_repos.name: Fincept-Corporation/FinceptTerminal
all_repos.description: FinceptTerminal is a modern finance application offering advanced market analytics, investment research, and economic data tools, designed for interactive exploration and data-driven decision-making in a user-friendly environment.
